projectDescription: An R package for robust multivariate outlier detection using methods that remain effective under non-Gaussian distributions.
keyFeatures: Robust distance computation using Minimum Covariance Determinant (MCD)
Multiple thresholding strategies: SI, SI-boot, MI, MI-boot, F-distribution, and SHASH
SHASH (Sinh-Arcsinh) distribution transformation for normalizing non-Gaussian data
Univariate outlier detection with isolation forest pre-screening
Multiple imputation pipeline for handling outlier-contaminated datasets
S3 methods for plotting and summarizing results
publicApiSurface: threshold_RD(x, w, method, RD_obj, impute_method, cutoff, trans, M, k, alpha, quantile, verbose, boot_quant, B)
SHASH_out(x, thr0, thr1, thr, tail, use_iso, thr_iso, maxit, weight_init)
